scripts.Uitests: rmdir /s /q allure-results & npx playwright test searchDestinationTestSA.spec.js --reporter=line,allure-playwright & allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report
scripts.currentTest: rmdir /s /q allure-results & npx playwright test verifyChecked.test.ts --reporter=line,allure-playwright & allure generate allure-results --clean --single-file -o allure-report & allure open allure-report
scripts.currentTestWithoutAllureopen: rmdir /s /q allure-results & npx playwright test verify_dynamicID.test.ts --reporter=line,allure-playwright & allure generate allure-results --clean --single-file -o allure-report
scripts.alerttest: set TEST_ENV=qa & rmdir /s /q allure-results & npx playwright test VerifyAlerts.test.ts --reporter=line,allure-playwright & allure generate allure-results --clean --single-file -o allure-report
scripts.runPlaygroundFoldertests: rmdir /s /q allure-results & set TEST_ENV=test & npx playwright test playground_tests --reporter=line,allure-playwright & allure generate allure-results --clean --single-file -o allure-report
scripts.paralleltest: rmdir /s /q allure-results & npx playwright test tests/playground_tests --grep SBP --reporter=line,allure-playwright & allure generate allure-results --clean --single-file -o allure-report & allure open allure-report
